exampleSentences: Anh ấy thật sự rất dũng khi giúp đỡ người khác trong nguy hiểm.
Chị cần phải dũng để nói lên ý kiến của mình trước lớp.
Em thấy dũng khi em đứng trên sân khấu lần đầu tiên.

translation.en: She is very brave in every situation.

content.sentence: Cô ấy rất ___ trong mọi tình huống.

notes_md:
**dũng** means *brave* or *courageous*. It talks about facing fear or danger without backing down.

In modern Vietnamese, **dũng** is rarely used alone — it almost always appears in compounds, especially **dũng cảm** (brave). It describes a person’s character or actions.

Strong synonym to remember: **can đảm** (brave).  
Clear opposite: **hèn nhát** (cowardly).

You’ll also see it in names or formal words like **anh dũng** (heroic).

definitions.en: Bravery or courage in facing difficulties or danger.
definitions.es: Valentía o coraje al enfrentar dificultades o peligros.
definitions.vi: Sự can đảm hoặc dũng cảm khi đối mặt với khó khăn hoặc nguy hiểm.

example.es: Él es muy valiente al enfrentar el peligro.
example.vi: Anh ấy rất dũng cảm khi đối mặt với nguy hiểm.
example.en: He is very brave when facing danger.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He is really very brave when helping others in danger.
You need to be brave to speak your opinion in front of the class.
I felt brave when I stood on stage for the first time.
notes:

In modern Vietnamese, dũng is rarely used alone — it almost always appears in compounds, especially dũng cảm (brave). It describes a person’s character or actions.

Strong synonym to remember: can đảm (brave).  
Clear opposite: hèn nhát (cowardly).

You’ll also see it in names or formal words like anh dũng (heroic).

translation.en: He is very brave when facing difficulties.

content.sentence: Anh ấy rất ___ khi đối mặt với khó khăn.
